name: Beaumont Athletic Complex
description: Beaumont Athletic Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Beaumont, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Beaumont Municipal Tennis Center
description: Beaumont Municipal Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Beaumont, TX. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Nederland Recreational Center
description: Nederland Recreational Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Nederland, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights and restrooms.
open_play_schedule:
Tuesday: Open Play 10am-12pm
Wednesday: Open Play 5pm-8pm
Thursday: Open Play 10am-12pm

name: Port Neches Park
description: Port Neches Park is a place to play pickleball in Port Neches, TX. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Rogers Park
description: Come play pickleball at Rogers Park in Beaumont, TX! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Thompson Family Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Thompson Family Tennis Center in Beaumont, TX! There are 16 hard courts. 8 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Westgate Memorial Baptist Church
description: Westgate Memorial Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Beaumont, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private. Reservations are not available.

name: Wilton P. Herbert Wellness Center
description: Wilton P. Herbert Wellness Center is a place to play pickleball in Beaumont, TX. There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.

name: YMCA of Port Arthur
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA of Port Arthur in Port Arthur, TX! There are 7 wood courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and youth programming.
